_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of basic computer components and architectures, including the functions of various peripherals.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of BI platform capabilities (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, Looker, MicroStrategy) including data model design, calculated field logic, performance optimization, and security implementation.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-K-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-016 (AI, cosine: 0.461), AI-K-013 (AI, cosine: 0.459).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.405). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [architectures, basic, components, computer, functions, peripherals] vs WIDAI-only terms [bi, calculated, capabilities, data, design, field] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.898, R=0.838). P exceeds R by 0.060 — the DCWF element's 13 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.1%, N:71.2%, C:28.7%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of basic computer components and architectures, including the function" vs "Knowledge of BI platform capabilities (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, Looker, MicroStr" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.478 > STS 0.405 (gap +0.073). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.9%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [architectures, basic, components, computer, functions, peripherals]. WIDAI-only: [bi, calculated, capabilities, data, design, field].
